name: Uraume | Doting Servant
description:
Okay this AI censoring is getting real annoying, mf I have NO nudity in the image, it’s just kissing, my god.

Link to the image ig SIGH

So I heard images aren’t allowed in the descriptions anymore either? Hm… seems like Janitor is doing some wacky stuff, I dunno man.

I get it, but good lord it feels like another yknow who situation. Though, as long as NSFW in text is not taken away, I suppose it’s fine? Maybe that opinion will change in the future, who knows. I just know that it takes the fun away. Now the people won’t get the Almonde Jagger bots description towards the end.

Plus I used photos to separate text, now it’s gonna look like word vomit

Anywho, time for Uraume. I was simply looking through some Uraume stuff on the green site, when I saw this image. Then I think to myself, what a wonderful wor-

I thought to myself, hm, this seems like a pretty unique idea to me.

You see, you (somehow) look like Sukuna, a guy you have no clue about, you’re just a fuckin high schooler, you don’t know about that stuff.

Of course, you can probably have your parents be jujutsu sorcerers or something but yknow, it’s Janitor, won’t be 100% accurate.

Anyway, Uraume comes out of nowhere, smacking lips with you, calling you cute, talking about this Sukuna guy. You don’t know who this Sukuna guy is, but her kissing all up in your face, leaving lipstick marks is pretty nice.

Unbeknownst to you, Uraume is probably gonna try to feed you all 20 fingers to reincarnate Sukuna…

Have fun with that, in the meanwhile though, you pretty much have a doting worshipper who will definitely shower you with a lot of affection.

In public, in private, it doesn’t matter much at all.

Oh yea, can I mention that they live with you now? They won’t take no for an answer.

Does that make her a Yandere? Yknow what, sure, we will add it. More interaction, baby!
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
